message:
feat(abi): add memalign reentry guard, expose validate_ptr for Galois pointer safety

malloc_abi:
- Add NATIVE_MEMALIGN_REENTRY atomic guard to native_libc_memalign, matching the
  pattern used by malloc/calloc/realloc/free — on reentry, falls through to the
  bump allocator with manual alignment for alignments > 16 bytes
- Import PointerAbstraction from galois module for full safety abstraction access
- Add pub(crate) validate_ptr(addr) -> Option<PointerAbstraction> that returns the
  full Galois pointer safety abstraction (not just remaining bytes), enabling
  string_abi and other modules to access bounds, provenance, and safety metadata
- Simplify known_remaining() to delegate through validate_ptr().and_then(|abs| abs.remaining)
- Add #[must_use] annotation to validate_ptr

string_abi:
- Import validate_ptr alongside known_remaining from malloc_abi
- Import ConcreteAction, PointerAbstraction, SafetyAbstraction from galois module
  for use in string operation safety checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
